programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: With the 14th Precincts detectives driving taxi cabs to solve a rash of hack murders Mary Beths son becomes frightened the ruse will cost his mother her life

programme.title: Starsky 306
programme.desc: Starsky 306

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: A group of terrorists steals a prototype in-flight computer that can turn any commercial aircraft into a fighting unit While escaping one of the terrorists is wounded and the group holes up in a small mountain community where they shanghai the services of a combat medic and lock his friends up in a meat locker When the terrorists discover that the medic has flight skills as well they get him to aid in their escape but Doc manages to get away and finds String whos out looking for the prototype with Airwolf String manages to rescue Docs friends but hes injured in the process and Doc must fly Airwolf to prevent the terrorists from escaping with the prototype computer

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A college student dreams of becoming a werewolf and discovers an antique camera that will turn him into his favorite movie monster

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E33
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E33

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E36
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E36

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Its Rogers birthday and hes angry with Mister Ed for eating apples from his trees

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Rifleman 514
programme.desc: Rifleman 514

programme.title: Gunsmoke S05E34 Speak Me Fair

programme.title: Gunsmoke S06E35 Chesters Dilemma
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S06E35 Chesters Dilemma

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Angry with the way a beautiful deaf-mute girl is treated by her father a sheepherder living in a remote mountain cabin Little Joe takes it upon himself to teach her sign language so they can communicate better His plan backfires when the young woman falls in love with him and the girls brutish neighbor resents her lavishing attention on the youngest Cartwright

programme.title: West 316
programme.desc: West 316

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The owner of a warehouse distributorship threatens to report Kimble to the police if he doesnt stay away from his sister He has no interest in her but when she kidnaps a small boy he must choose between saving the boy or himself

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric jumps a train in his quest for Skorzeny He finds a band of hobos who are suspicious of him when one of their members has his throat slit while they sleep

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The death of a model recalls for Nick his own infatuation with a beautiful ballerina one hundred years ago

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan learns that a woman is using a deadly quilt to murder members of a religious sect but the tightly-knit group blames him for the killing

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Fredy 119
programme.desc: Fredy 119

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Pepino feels his job is threatened when Grampa takes on another hired hand

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wants nothing to do with his wealthy new neighbors

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve some secret plans that are sewn into a dress according to a model

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends the Tiptons an elderly but feisty couple being forced out of their home and into a retirement community that is being used as a cover for an illegal skin flick operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: After Klink finds Sergeant Schultz drunk he gets a tough new replacement

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Thinking that a visiting Personnel Officer has come to appraise Binghamton for a possible promotion and transfer McHale and the 73 Crew put on a show of their very best behavior But when they discover that the real reason for the Officers visit is to appraise McHale for a possible transfer they must quickly become the most incompetent PT Crew in the South Pacific

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton needs help from Chief Urulu and his Tribe to modify the Taratupa airstrip Urulu - Angry over a bad deal with Gruber involving Navy property - Flatly refuses But after some lessons on Democracy from McHale and Parker Urulu changes his mind and drives a hard bargain with Binghamton for the services of his Tribe

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jennifer overhears an acquaintance and his mistress planning to murder his wife on the ski slopes she and Jonathan jet off to Vail to prevent it -- but are they too late to save her on the ski trail

programme.title: Newhart - 705
programme.desc: Newhart - 705

programme.title: Newhart - 803
programme.desc: Newhart - 803

programme.title: Major 221
programme.desc: Major 221

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways take precautions against a coming typhoon an accidental blow to the head causes Gilligans mouth to act as a radio receiver

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan go undercover as a gigolo and a wealthy widow to entrap a group of robbers But they enjoy their roles so much that they almost forget the reason for it until its too late

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: Hercules 105
programme.desc: Hercules 105

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Belmans daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election somebody who will stand up to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren have finally learned the identities of the Blackwood team They use it to their advantage by creating doubles framing them for an armed bank robbery where several people were shot dead Malzor impersonates a city police officer and joins in the manhunt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A New York City detective comes to San Francisco in search of a cop killers

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF agent Rollin Hand impersonating mobster Frank Wayne has a counter-proposal for the other mob bosses He says hell undergo plastic surgery to look like a different man In comes Cinnamon In reality she is undoing Rollins makeup; she can afford no mistakes because the other mob bosses are watching the entire time Meanwhile a doctor working for the IMF is performing plastic surgery on the real Wayne -- making him to look like Rollin All of this is part of Phelpss plan aimed at getting access to Waynes records But Phelps himself will face an attempted hit before the mission can be concluded

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are in the courtroom testifying in a case in which the probable cause for them to conduct a search of the suspects car is in question The probable cause is to be provided by a witness who is late arriving to court

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Police drag in Kimble when a co-worker robs the liquor store the fugitives clerking in Some police suspect Kimbles involved but their chief knows hes not - because his alienated son is the stick-up man To repair their relationship the desperate father needs to get his son off Will he feed Kimble to his wolves to do so

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher and long time family friend suddenly sets out to ruin the Barkleys He has intense hatred of Jarrod who he suspects is having an affair with his young wife

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Scouting for the army Cheyenne reports of an impending attack Fleeing to another fort the commanding officers route to that fort seems more dangerous than the alternate and Cheyenne isnt the only one who disagrees

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Tommyknockers
programme.desc: The small town of Haven becomes a hot-bed of inventions all run by a strange green power device The whole town is digging something up in the woods and only an alcoholic poet can discover the secret of the Tommyknockers

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jesse Arnett

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: POWER CEOS WITH JEN GAUDET
programme.desc:
In this episode of Power CEOs host Jen Gaudet is joined by Brittany Anderson and Disha Solanki for a conversation about what really happens behind growth partnerships leadership and exits
The discussion focuses on the challenges founders face when scaling businesses that become overly dependent on them leading to burnout overwhelm and loss of clarity

programme.title: YOUR LIFE AND LEGACY WITH CHRISTOPHER NUDO
programme.desc:
In this powerful episode of Your Life and Legacy host Christopher Nudo sits down with financial advisor and industry leader Wayne Von Borstel to explore the deeper meaning of wealth stewardship and legacy
Wayne shares how a pivotal moment at just 18 years old—when his grandmother trusted him to invest her savings—sparked a lifelong commitment to responsibility growth and serving others

programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Sheila saves a girl named Karina from a magic trap but Karina turns evil Meanwhile the kids are looking for a pair of magic rings that might send them home not realizing that Karina has one of the rings

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids encounter a race of tiny friendly dragons who are being hunted by an evil king By saving the dragons they may find their way home
